arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [1]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (1)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 1)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 1)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [1]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [2]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (2)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 2)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 2)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [2]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [3]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (3)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 3)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 3)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [3]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [4]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (4)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 4)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 4)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [4]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [5]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (5)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 5)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 5)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [5]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [6]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (6)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 6)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 6)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [6]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [7]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (7)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 7)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 7)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [7]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [8]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (8)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 8)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 8)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [8]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [9]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (9)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 9)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 9)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [9]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [10]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (10)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 10)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 10)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [10]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [11]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (11)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 11)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 11)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [11]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [12]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (12)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 12)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 12)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [12]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [13]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (13)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 13)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 13)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [13]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [14]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (14)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 14)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 14)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [14]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [15]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (15)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 15)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 15)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [15]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [16]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (16)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 16)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 16)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [16]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [17]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (17)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 17)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 17)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [17]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [18]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (18)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 18)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 18)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [18]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [19]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (19)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 19)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 19)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [19]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [20]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (20)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 20)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 20)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [20]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [21]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (21)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 21)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 21)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [21]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [22]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (22)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 22)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 22)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [22]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [23]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (23)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 23)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 23)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [23]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [24]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (24)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 24)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 24)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [24]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [25]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (25)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 25)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 25)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [25]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [26]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (26)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 26)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 26)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [26]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [27]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (27)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 27)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 27)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [27]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [28]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (28)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 28)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 28)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [28]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [29]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (29)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 29)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 29)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [29]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [30]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (30)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 30)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 30)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [30]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نَسَبُ الرَّسُولِ الْمُصْطَفَى وَطَهَارَةُ أَصْلِهِ الْمُقَدَّسِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [31]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Nasabur-Rasūlil-Muṣṭafā wa ṭahāratu aṣlihil-muqaddas) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (31)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The ancestry of the Chosen Messenger and the purity of his sacred lineage) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 31)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Ancestry & Noble Lineage] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Mbiir mi ca askanum Yonent bi ak laabug askanam gu sell ga) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 31)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مْبِيرْ مِ سَ اَسْكَنُمْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ اَكْ لَابُجْ اَسْكَنَمْ جُ سِلْ جَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [31]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [32]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (32)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 32)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 32)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [32]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [33]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (33)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 33)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 33)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [33]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [34]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (34)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 34)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 34)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [34]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [35]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (35)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 35)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 35)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [35]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [36]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (36)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 36)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 36)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [36]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [37]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (37)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 37)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 37)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [37]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [38]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (38)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 38)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 38)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [38]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [39]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (39)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 39)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 39)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [39]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [40]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (40)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 40)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 40)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [40]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [41]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (41)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 41)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 41)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [41]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [42]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (42)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 42)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 42)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [42]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [43]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (43)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 43)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 43)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [43]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [44]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (44)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 44)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 44)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [44]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [45]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (45)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 45)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 45)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [45]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [46]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (46)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 46)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 46)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [46]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [47]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (47)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 47)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 47)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [47]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [48]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (48)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 48)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 48)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [48]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [49]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (49)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 49)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 49)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [49]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [50]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (50)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 50)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 50)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [50]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [51]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (51)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 51)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 51)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [51]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [52]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (52)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 52)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 52)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [52]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [53]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (53)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 53)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 53)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [53]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [54]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (54)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 54)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 54)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [54]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [55]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (55)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 55)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 55)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [55]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [56]
