latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (56)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 56)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 56)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [56]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [57]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (57)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 57)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 57)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [57]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [58]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (58)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 58)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 58)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [58]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [59]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (59)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 59)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 59)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [59]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [60]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (60)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 60)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 60)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [60]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [61]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (61)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 61)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 61)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [61]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وِلَادَةُ الْحَبِيبِ فِي مَكَّةَ عَامَ الْفِيلِ مَعَ الْأَنْوَارِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [62]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Wilādatul-ḥabībi fī Makkata ‘āmal-fīli ma‘al-anwār) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (62)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The miraculous birth of the Beloved in Mecca in the Year of the Elephant with light) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 62)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Miraculous Birth in Mecca] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Juddug Yonent bi ca atum ñay ja ca Makka and ak leeraay) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 62)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (جُدُّجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ اَتُمْ نْيَيْ جَ سَ مَكَّ اَنْدْ اَكْ لِيرَايْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [62]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [63]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (63)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 63)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 63)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [63]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [64]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (64)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 64)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 64)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [64]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [65]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (65)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 65)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 65)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [65]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [66]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (66)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 66)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 66)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [66]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [67]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (67)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 67)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 67)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [67]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [68]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (68)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 68)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 68)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [68]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [69]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (69)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 69)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 69)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [69]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [70]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (70)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 70)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 70)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [70]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [71]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (71)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 71)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 71)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [71]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [72]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (72)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 72)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 72)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [72]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [73]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (73)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 73)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 73)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [73]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [74]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (74)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 74)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 74)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [74]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [75]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (75)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 75)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 75)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [75]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [76]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (76)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 76)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 76)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [76]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [77]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (77)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 77)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 77)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [77]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [78]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (78)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 78)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 78)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [78]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [79]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (79)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 79)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 79)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [79]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [80]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (80)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 80)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 80)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [80]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [81]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (81)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 81)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 81)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [81]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [82]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (82)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 82)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 82)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [82]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [83]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (83)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 83)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 83)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [83]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [84]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (84)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 84)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 84)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [84]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [85]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (85)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 85)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 85)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [85]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [86]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (86)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 86)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 86)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [86]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [87]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (87)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 87)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 87)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [87]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [88]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (88)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 88)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 88)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [88]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [89]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (89)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 89)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 89)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [89]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [90]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (90)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 90)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 90)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [90]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [91]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (91)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 91)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 91)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [91]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [92]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (92)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 92)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 92)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [92]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (شَبَابُ الرَّسُولِ وَسَفَرُهُ وَزِوَاجُهُ مِنْ خَدِيجَةَ الْكُبْرَى) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [93]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Shabābur-Rasūli wa safaruhu wa ziwājuhu min Khadījatal-Kubrā) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (93)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The youth of the Messenger, his travel, and marriage to Lady Khadijah the Great) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 93)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Youth & Marriage to Khadijah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ndogatug Yonent bi, gàddaayam, ak séeyam ak yaay Khadija) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 93)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (نْدُجَتُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ جَدَّايَمْ اَكْ سِييَمْ اَكْ يَايْ خَدِيجَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [93]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [94]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (94)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 94)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 94)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [94]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [95]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (95)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 95)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 95)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [95]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [96]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (96)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 96)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 96)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [96]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [97]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (97)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 97)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 97)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [97]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [98]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (98)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 98)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 98)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [98]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [99]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (99)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 99)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 99)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [99]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [100]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (100)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 100)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 100)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [100]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [101]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (101)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 101)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 101)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [101]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [102]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (102)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 102)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 102)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [102]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [103]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (103)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 103)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 103)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [103]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [104]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (104)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 104)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 104)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [104]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [105]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (105)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 105)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 105)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [105]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [106]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (106)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 106)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 106)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [106]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [107]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (107)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 107)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 107)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [107]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [108]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (108)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 108)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 108)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [108]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [109]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (109)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 109)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 109)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [109]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [110]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (110)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 110)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 110)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [110]
