arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [111]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (111)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 111)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 111)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [111]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [112]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (112)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 112)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 112)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [112]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [113]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (113)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 113)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 113)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [113]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [114]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (114)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 114)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 114)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [114]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [115]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (115)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 115)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 115)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [115]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [116]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (116)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 116)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 116)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [116]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [117]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (117)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 117)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 117)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [117]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [118]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (118)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 118)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 118)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [118]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [119]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (119)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 119)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 119)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [119]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [120]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (120)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 120)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 120)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [120]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [121]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (121)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 121)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 121)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [121]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [122]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (122)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 122)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 122)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [122]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [123]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (123)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 123)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 123)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [123]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (بَعْثَةُ الرَّسُولِ فِي غَارِ حِرَاءٍ وَنُزُولُ الْوَحْيِ بِاقْرَأْ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [124]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ba‘thatur-Rasūli fī ghāri Ḥirā'a wa nuzūlul-waḥyi bi-Iqra') - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (124)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Prophethood & Cave Hira] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The commission of the Messenger in Cave Hira and revelation starting with 'Iqra') by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 124)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Prophethood & Cave Hira] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Wàcciug Alxuraan ca xuntum Hira ak ubbéem ca 'Iqra') ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 124)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (وَاسِّيُجْ اَلْخُرَانْ سَ خُنْتُمْ حِرَاءْ اَكْ أُبِّيمْ سَ اِقْرَأْ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [124]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [125]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (125)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 125)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 125)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [125]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [126]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (126)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 126)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 126)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [126]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [127]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (127)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 127)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 127)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [127]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [128]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (128)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 128)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 128)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [128]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [129]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (129)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 129)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 129)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [129]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [130]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (130)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 130)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 130)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [130]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [131]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (131)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 131)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 131)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [131]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [132]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (132)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 132)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 132)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [132]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [133]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (133)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 133)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 133)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [133]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [134]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (134)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 134)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 134)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [134]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [135]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (135)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 135)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 135)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [135]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [136]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (136)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 136)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 136)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [136]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [137]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (137)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 137)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 137)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [137]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [138]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (138)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 138)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 138)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [138]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [139]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (139)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 139)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 139)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [139]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [140]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (140)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 140)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 140)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [140]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [141]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (141)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 141)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 141)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [141]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [142]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (142)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 142)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 142)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [142]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [143]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (143)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 143)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 143)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [143]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [144]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (144)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 144)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 144)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [144]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [145]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (145)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 145)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 145)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [145]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [146]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (146)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 146)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 146)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [146]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [147]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (147)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 147)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 147)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [147]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [148]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (148)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 148)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 148)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [148]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [149]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (149)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 149)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 149)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [149]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [150]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (150)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 150)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 150)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [150]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [151]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (151)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 151)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 151)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [151]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [152]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (152)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 152)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 152)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [152]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [153]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (153)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 153)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 153)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [153]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [154]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (154)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 154)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 154)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [154]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (صَبْرُ الرَّسُولِ عَلَى أَذَى قُرَيْشٍ وَالْحِصَارُ فِي الشِّعْبِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [155]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ṣabrur-Rasūli ‘alā adhā Qurayshin wal-ḥiṣāru fish-shi‘b) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (155)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Patience Under Persecution] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The patience of the Messenger under the persecution of Quraysh and the Boycott) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 155)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Patience Under Persecution] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Muñug Yonent bi ca loralu Quraysh yi ak tëj ga ca bërëb ba) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 155)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (مُنُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ لُرَلُ قُرَيْشْ يِ اَكْ تِجْ جَ سَ بِرِٜbْ بَ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [155]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [156]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (156)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 156)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 156)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [156]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [157]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (157)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 157)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 157)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [157]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [158]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (158)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 158)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 158)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [158]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [159]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (159)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 159)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 159)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [159]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [160]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (160)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 160)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 160)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [160]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [161]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (161)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 161)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 161)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [161]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [162]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (162)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 162)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 162)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [162]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [163]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (163)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 163)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 163)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [163]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [164]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (164)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 164)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 164)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [164]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [165]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (165)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 165)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 165)
