wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [165]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [166]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (166)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 166)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 166)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [166]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [167]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (167)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 167)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 167)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [167]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [168]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (168)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 168)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 168)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [168]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [169]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (169)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 169)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 169)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [169]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [170]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (170)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 170)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 170)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [170]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [171]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (171)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 171)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 171)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [171]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [172]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (172)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 172)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 172)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [172]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [173]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (173)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 173)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 173)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [173]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [174]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (174)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 174)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 174)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [174]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [175]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (175)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 175)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 175)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [175]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [176]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (176)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 176)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 176)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [176]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [177]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (177)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 177)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 177)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [177]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [178]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (178)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 178)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 178)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [178]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [179]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (179)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 179)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 179)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [179]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [180]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (180)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 180)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 180)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [180]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [181]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (181)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 181)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 181)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [181]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [182]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (182)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 182)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 182)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [182]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [183]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (183)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 183)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 183)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [183]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [184]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (184)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 184)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 184)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [184]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [185]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (185)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 185)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 185)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [185]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (الْإِسْرَاءُ وَالْمِعْرَاجُ وَهِجْرَةُ الرَّسُولِ إِلَى الْمَدِينَةِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [186]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Al-Isrā'u wal-Mi‘rāju wa hijratur-Rasūli ilal-Madīnah) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (186)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Night Journey and Ascension, and the Migration of the Messenger to Medina) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 186)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Al-Isra' wal-Mi'raj & Hijrah] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Isrâ wal Mihrâj, ak gàddaayug Yonent bi ca Madina) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 186)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (اِسْرَاءْ وَالْمِعْرَاجْ اَكْ جَدَّايُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ سَ مَدِينَة) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [186]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [187]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (187)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 187)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 187)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [187]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [188]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (188)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 188)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 188)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [188]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [189]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (189)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 189)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 189)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [189]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [190]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (190)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 190)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 190)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [190]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [191]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (191)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 191)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 191)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [191]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [192]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (192)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 192)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 192)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [192]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [193]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (193)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 193)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 193)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [193]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [194]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (194)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 194)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 194)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [194]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [195]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (195)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 195)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 195)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [195]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [196]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (196)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 196)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 196)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [196]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [197]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (197)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 197)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 197)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [197]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [198]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (198)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 198)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 198)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [198]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [199]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (199)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 199)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 199)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [199]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [200]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (200)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 200)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 200)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [200]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [201]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (201)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 201)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 201)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [201]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [202]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (202)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 202)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 202)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [202]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [203]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (203)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 203)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 203)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [203]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [204]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (204)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 204)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 204)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [204]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [205]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (205)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 205)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 205)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [205]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [206]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (206)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 206)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 206)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [206]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [207]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (207)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 207)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 207)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [207]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [208]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (208)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 208)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 208)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [208]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [209]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (209)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 209)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 209)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [209]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [210]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (210)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 210)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 210)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [210]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [211]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (211)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 211)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 211)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [211]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [212]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (212)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 212)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 212)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [212]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [213]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (213)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 213)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 213)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [213]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [214]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (214)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 214)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 214)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [214]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [215]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (215)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 215)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 215)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [215]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [216]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (216)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 216)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 216)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [216]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَأْسِيسُ جَامِعَةِ الْمَدِينَةِ وَالْمُؤَاخَاةُ بَيْنَ الْمُهَاجِرِينَ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [217]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ta'sīsu jāmi‘atil-Madīnati wal-mu'ākhātu baynal-Muhājirīn) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (217)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Establishing the Medina State] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (Establishing the state of Medina and brotherhood between Emigrants and Helpers) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 217)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Establishing the Medina State] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Taxawal dëgg ca Madina ak boole gi ca digente Muhajirin yi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 217)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (تَخَوَلْ دِٜجّ سَ مَدِينَة اَكْ بُولِ جِ سِ دِجِنْتِ مُهَاجِرِينْ يِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [217]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [218]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (218)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 218)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 218)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [218]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [219]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (219)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 219)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 219)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [219]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [220]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (220)
