englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 220)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 220)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [220]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [221]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (221)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 221)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 221)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [221]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [222]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (222)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 222)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 222)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [222]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [223]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (223)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 223)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 223)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [223]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [224]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (224)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 224)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 224)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [224]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [225]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (225)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 225)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 225)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [225]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [226]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (226)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 226)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 226)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [226]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [227]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (227)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 227)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 227)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [227]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [228]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (228)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 228)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 228)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [228]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [229]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (229)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 229)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 229)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [229]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [230]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (230)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 230)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 230)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [230]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [231]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (231)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 231)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 231)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [231]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [232]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (232)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 232)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 232)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [232]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [233]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (233)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 233)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 233)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [233]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [234]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (234)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 234)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 234)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [234]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [235]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (235)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 235)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 235)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [235]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [236]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (236)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 236)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 236)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [236]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [237]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (237)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 237)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 237)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [237]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [238]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (238)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 238)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 238)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [238]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [239]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (239)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 239)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 239)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [239]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [240]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (240)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 240)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 240)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [240]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [241]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (241)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 241)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 241)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [241]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [242]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (242)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 242)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 242)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [242]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [243]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (243)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 243)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 243)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [243]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [244]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (244)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 244)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 244)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [244]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [245]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (245)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 245)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 245)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [245]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [246]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (246)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 246)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 246)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [246]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [247]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (247)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 247)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 247)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [247]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (فَتْحُ مَكَّةَ الْمُعَظَّمَةِ وَدُخُولُ النَّاسِ فِي دِينِ اللَّهِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [248]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Fatḥu Makkatal-Mu‘aẓẓamati wa dukhūlun-nāsi fī dīnillāh) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (248)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Conquest of Great Mecca and people entering into the religion of Allah) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 248)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Conquest of Mecca & Treaties] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Ubbéeg Makka mu barkeel ma ak dugug nit yi ci diine Yàlla) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 248)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (أُبِّيجْ مَكَّ مُ بَرْكِيلْ مَ اَكْ دُجُجْ نِتْ يِ سِ دِينِ يَٚlَّ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [248]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [249]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (249)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 249)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 249)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [249]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [250]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (250)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 250)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 250)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [250]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [251]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (251)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 251)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 251)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [251]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [252]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (252)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 252)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 252)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [252]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [253]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (253)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 253)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 253)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [253]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [254]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (254)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 254)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 254)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [254]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [255]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (255)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 255)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 255)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [255]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [256]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (256)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 256)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 256)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [256]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [257]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (257)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 257)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 257)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [257]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [258]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (258)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 258)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 258)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [258]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [259]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (259)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 259)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 259)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [259]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [260]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (260)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 260)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 260)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [260]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [261]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (261)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 261)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 261)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [261]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [262]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (262)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 262)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 262)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [262]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [263]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (263)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 263)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 263)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [263]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [264]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (264)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 264)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 264)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [264]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [265]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (265)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 265)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 265)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [265]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [266]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (266)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 266)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 266)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [266]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [267]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (267)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 267)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 267)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [267]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [268]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (268)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 268)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 268)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [268]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [269]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (269)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 269)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 269)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [269]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [270]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (270)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 270)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 270)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [270]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ وَبِهَذَا تَنْشَرِحُ الصُّدُورُ وَتَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ بِالْإِيمَانِ وَالْيَقِينِ. [271]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' wa bi-hādhā tanshariḥuṣ-ṣudūru wa taṭma'innul-qulūbu bil-īmāni wal-yaqīn. (271)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby and by this, chests are expanded and hearts find tranquility with faith and certainty. (Stanza 271)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na xol yi ubbeeku and ak dëgëral ngëm ak dëgg-dëgg. (Wers 271)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ خُلْ يِ أُبِّيكُ اَنْدْ اَكْ دِٜجِٜrَلْ نْجِٜnْ اَكْ دِٜجّ دِٜجّ [271]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَفِي ذَلِكَ نَجَاةٌ لِلْمُرِيدِ وَرِفْعَةٌ لِقَدْرِهِ فِي الدُّنْيَا وَالْآخِرَةِ. [272]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa fī dhālika najātun lil-murīdi wa rif‘atun li-qadrihi fid-dunyā wal-ākhirah. (272)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and in that is salvation for the seeker and elevation for his status in this world and the next. (Stanza 272)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne te ca lolu la ndam nekk ca àdduna ak àllaxira. (Wers 272)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ تِ سَ لُلُ لَ نْدَمْ نِكَّ سَ اَدُّنَ اَكْ اَلَّخِرَ [272]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِيَظْهَرَ لِلْمَلَأِ كَمَالُ فَضْلِهِ وَرِفْعَةُ مَقَامِهِ الْعَالِي. [273]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-yaẓhara lil-mala'i kamālu faḍlihi wa rif‘atu maqāmihil-‘ālī. (273)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby so that the perfection of his favor and his high elevated status are manifested to the people. (Stanza 273)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir féeñël ca nit ñi matug kaweem ak màkkaam ca kaw. (Wers 273)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ فِيرْيِࣺلْ سَ نِتْ نْيِ مَتُجْ كَوِيمْ اَكْ مَكَّامْ سَ كَوْ [273]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا وَبِذَلِكَ نَالَتِ الْأُمَّةُ الْإِسْلَامِيَّةُ خَيْرَ هِدَايَةٍ فِي الْعَالَمِينَ. [274]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā wa bi-dhālika nālatil-ummatul-islāmiyyatu khayra hidāyetin fil-‘ālamīn. (274)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby and by that, the Islamic nation received the best guidance among the worlds. (Stanza 274)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne te lolu tax na mbooloom jullit yi am gindi gu rafet ca àdduna. (Wers 274)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ تِ لُلُ تَخْ نَ مْبُولُومْ جُلِّتْ يِ اَمْ جِنْدِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ اَدُّنَ [274]
