arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَعَلَيْهِ الصَّلَاةُ وَالسَّلَامُ مَا دَارَ الْفَلَكُ فِي السَّمَاءِ فَهُوَ السِّرَاجُ الْمُنِيرُ الَّذِي مَحَا اللَّهُ بِهِ ظُلُمَاتِ الشِّرْكِ. [275]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa ‘alayhiṣ-ṣalātu was-salāmu mā dāral-falaku fis-samā' fahuwas-sirājul-munīrul-ladhī maḥallāhu bihi ẓulumātish-shirk. (275)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And may blessings and peace be upon him as long as the orbit revolves in the heavens, thereby for he is the shining lamp through whom Allah erased the darkness of association. (Stanza 275)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Julli ak jaam ñangi ci kawam ba bis du jex ca asaman, te yokk ci ne ndax mooy leeraay bi Yàlla dindié lëndëmug bokkaale ca dëgg. (Wers 275)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - جُلِّ اَكْ جَامْ نْيَنْجِ سِ كَوَمْ بَ بِسُ دُ جِخْ سَ اَسَمَنْ نْدَخْ مُويْ لِيرَايْ بِ يَٚlَّ دِنْدِي لِٜnْدِٜnمُجْ بُكَّالِ سَ دِٜجّ [275]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - فَاحْرِصْ عَلَى تَعْظِيمِ هَذِهِ السِّيرَةِ النَّبَوِيَّةِ الْعَطِرَةِ وَعَلَى آلِهِ وَأَصْحَابِهِ جَمِيعاً مَدَى الْأَيَّامِ وَالْعُصُورِ الطَّوِيلَةِ. [276]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Fa-ḥriṣ ‘alā ta‘ẓīmi hādhihis-sīratin-nabawiyyetil-‘aṭirah wa ‘alā ālihi wa aṣḥābihi jamī‘an madal-ayyāmi wal-‘uṣūriṭ-ṭawīlah. (276)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that So be diligent in honoring this sweet, fragrant prophetic biography, thereby and upon all his family and companions throughout the days and long eras. (Stanza 276)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Fexeel ba sàmm dundug Yonent bi ngir nga am barke, te yokk ci ne ak njabotam ak sa sàmbam yi ci at yu bari yi di ñëw. (Wers 276)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - فِخِيلْ بَ سَمْ دُنْدُجْ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ نْجِرْ نْجَ اَمْ بَرْكِ اَكْ نْجَبُوتَمْ اَكْ سَ سَمْبَمْ يِ سِ اَتْ يُ بَرِ يِ دِ نْيِوْ [276]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَيُبَيِّنُ الشَّارِحُ أَنَّ الْأَخْبَارِ الصَّحِيحَةِ بَيَانُ مَكْنُونِ ذَلِكَ لِتَكُونَ لَنَا نُورًا نَهْتَدِي بِهِ فِي السُّلُوكِ إِلَى رَبِّ الْعَرْشِ. [277]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Qad jā'a fil-akhbāriṣ-ṣaḥīḥati bayānu maknūni dhālik li-takūna lanā nūran nahtadī bihi fis-sulūki ilā Rabbil-‘arsh. (277)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that the narrative shows that the authentic narrations the explanation of the hidden details of this, thereby to be a light for us through which we are guided in our spiritual path to the Lord of the Throne. (Stanza 277)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Ñëw na ci xabar yu wër firi mbir mii ci dëgg, te yokk ci ne ngir mu nekk leeraay buy gindi sunu dox ca sa Boroom. (Wers 277)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - نْيِوِ نَ سِ خَبَرْ يُ وِٜrْ فِرِ مْبِرْ مِي سِ دِٜجّ نْجِرْ مُ نِكَّ لِيرَايْ بُيْ جِنْدِ سُنُ دُخْ سَ سَ بُرُومْ [277]

arabicText: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعِ وَتَمَامُ الدِّينِ وَوَفَاةُ الرَّسُولِ الْكَرِيمِ) - وَكَانَ الْمُصْطَفَى أَكْرَمَ خَلْقِ اللَّهِ ظَاهِرًا وَبَاطِنًا فَطُوبَى لِمَنْ تَمَسَّكَ بِهَدْيِهِ وَسَارَ عَلَى مَنْهَجِهِ السَّوِيِّ. [278]
latinTransliteration: Sharḥu qawlihi: (Ḥajjatul-wadā‘i wa tamāmud-dīni wa wafātur-Rasūlil-Karīm) - Wa kānal-Muṣṭafā akrama khalqillāhi ẓāhiran wa bāṭinā fa-ṭūbā li-man tamassaka bi-hadyihi wa sāra ‘alā manhajihis-sawiyy. (278)
englishTranslation: [Commentary on: Farewell & Sublime Character] The commentator expounds on the prophetic event (The Farewell Pilgrimage, completion of religion, and passing of the Noble Messenger) by clarifying that And the Chosen One was the most noble of Allah's creation outwardly and inwardly, thereby so glad tidings to whoever holds fast to his guidance and walks upon his straight methodology. (Stanza 278)
wolofTranslationStandard: [Firi ci: Farewell & Sublime Character] Seriñ bi firi na mbir mii (Hajjatul Wadâ, matug diine, ak dee gu rafet ca Yonent bi) ci li Yonent bi def, di féeñël ne Te Yonent bi mooy ku kawe mboolooy mbyindéef yi ci leer ak lëndëm, te yokk ci ne barkeel na ci ku sàmm yoonam te dox ca yoon wu jub wa. (Wers 278)
wolofalAjamiScript: شَرْحُ قَوْلِهِ: (حَجَّةُ الْوَدَاعْ مَتُجْ دِينِ اَكْ دِ جُ رَفِتْ سَ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ) - تِ يُونِٜnْتْ بِ مُويْ كُ كَوِ مْبُولُويْ مْبِيࣺنْدِيفْ يِ سِ لِيرْ اَكْ لِٜnْدِٜnمْ بَرْكِيلْ نَ سِ كُ سَمْ يُونَمْ تِ دُخْ سَ يُونْ وُ جُبْ وَ [278]
